## Documentation Issue

<!-- Describe what's wrong or missing from the documentation -->

## Location

<!-- Where in the documentation is this issue? -->

- **File(s)**: [e.g., README.md, docs/API.md, etc.]
- **Section**: [e.g., "Setup Instructions", "API Reference"]
- **URL**: [If applicable]

## Current State

<!-- What does the documentation currently say (or not say)? -->

## Suggested Improvement

<!-- What should the documentation say instead? -->

## Reason

<!-- Why is this change needed? What confusion does it clear up? -->

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other relevant information, screenshots, or examples -->

## Checklist

- [ ] I have checked that this isn't already covered elsewhere in the docs
- [ ] I have suggested specific improvements (not just "needs improvement")
- [ ] I would be willing to submit a PR for this change
